description: Hybrid-tiered Node vs Rust parity contract for high-level APIs.

tierDefinitions.tier1: Must-have high-level APIs required by app workflows and cross-language integration.
tierDefinitions.tier2: Lower-level or advanced APIs intentionally triaged for later parity work.

scanlog.description: Crash log orchestration, parsing, and crash analysis APIs.

config.description: YAML data and runtime configuration APIs.

version_registry.description: Game version lookup and compatibility APIs.
